Surah Ar-Rum · 30 : 21

Our Story

A love that started
with one number

It began with a chance encounter during STPM 2018. Hazerah had just transferred into Hafiz's class — and from that quiet first meeting, something began that neither could quite name.

A study WhatsApp group was created. Genuinely for studies, of course. Though truthfully, Hafiz just needed an excuse to have Hazerah's number. They chatted for hours — about lessons, about life, about everything in between.

2018 — STPM
A transfer student walked into class. A study group was formed. A number was exchanged. And everything began.
July 2019
After a long silence and a lost contact, Hafiz found Hazerah again through a saved Instagram account — the rezeki that would change everything. Many feelings were shared, though neither quite realised both hearts were already spoken for.
March 2025
During a project survey in Klang, under the quiet glow of a screen late at night, Hafiz proposed over WhatsApp. Hazerah said yes before he even finished asking.
November 2026
And now — by the grace of Allah — we get to do this forever. 🤍

The Rings

A symbol of
eternal love

Two rings. One promise. A bond blessed by Allah and witnessed by those we love most. May our love be as unending as the circle they form.

Join us on 08 November 2026 as we exchange these rings and begin our forever in Jementah, Johor.

FAQ

Questions?
We have
answers.

Still need help? Reach out to us directly via WhatsApp or drop us a message — we'd love to hear from you.

The venue is in Jementah, Johor. Use the Google Maps link in the Details section for turn-by-turn directions. Parking is available on site. If you're travelling from far, we recommend arriving the night before to avoid the early morning rush.
Formal or semi-formal attire is encouraged. Please dress modestly and elegantly to honour the occasion. Traditional Malay wear such as baju kurung or baju Melayu is very much welcome and warmly appreciated.
Children are warmly welcomed! Please note their attendance in the RSVP form so we can prepare accordingly. We kindly ask that parents keep little ones comfortable and supervised throughout the celebrations.
Yes — a full wedding reception meal will be served. Please let us know in the RSVP form if you have any dietary restrictions or food allergies so we can ensure you are well taken care of.
Please RSVP by 01 October 2026 so we can finalise the arrangements. Early responses are greatly appreciated. We cannot wait to celebrate this blessed day with you!
